forBusinessHeroSubtext: Businesses on fellis participate as community members — not as advertisers. Your presence earns trust.
forBusinessHowStep1Desc: Create a business profile with your name, logo, description, and category.
forBusinessHowStep2Desc: Join groups and local conversations relevant to your business.
forBusinessHowStep3Desc: Post offers, events, and updates that reach people who actually follow you.
forBusinessFeature1: Business profile page with contact info and opening hours
forBusinessFeature2: Post to your followers and relevant groups
forBusinessFeature4: Analytics: reach and engagement on your posts
forBusinessPricingFreeNote: Create and use your business profile — no credit card needed.
forBusinessPricingAdsDesc: Paid ad campaigns shown to users on the platform
forBusinessPricingBoostDesc: Increase the reach of individual posts
forBusinessPricingAdfreeDesc: Remove ads from your own feed
